creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The ETCDIR change was included in the update of stunnel to version 4.22b2 
that I just committed.  The update did the rest in a slightly different 
way because I'm waiting for a repository copy of stunnel.sh to stunnel.in 
to finish the USE_RC_SUBR=stunnel transition.  When the update is done, 
I'll finish the transition. 

Many thanks for your work and your patch!
